integrity: every frame is content-addressed: sha256(canonical(frame))[:16] == latest.json.hash == filename. An edge recomputes this and refuses to act on a mismatch (verify-before-act).
authenticity: v1.0 ships HMAC-SHA256 (closed nets) and a verify-before-act content root. PRODUCTION upgrades to Ed25519 / rapp-moment ECDSA P-256 so edges verify latest.json + frames with a PUBLIC key alone and cannot forge.
